'''âd-n-p''' ('''danapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jot|jot]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-n-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jot|jot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-n-p
|-
! Lemma
| danapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:danapithi|danapithi]] || [[word:danapiji|danapiji]] || [[word:danapishi|danapishi]] || [[word:danapi|danapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:danaputhuth|danaputhuth]] || [[word:danapujuj|danapujuj]] || [[word:danapushush|danapushush]] || [[word:danap|danap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:danaputhu|danaputhu]] || [[word:danapuju|danapuju]] || [[word:danapushu|danapushu]] || [[word:danapu|danapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:danapufuth|danapufuth]] || [[word:danapufuj|danapufuj]] || [[word:danapufush|danapufush]] || [[word:danapuf|danapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:danapethe|danapethe]] || [[word:danapeje|danapeje]] || [[word:danapeshe|danapeshe]] || [[word:danape|danape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:danapothoth|danapothoth]] || [[word:danapojoj|danapojoj]] || [[word:danaposhosh|danaposhosh]] || [[word:danap|danap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:danapotho|danapotho]] || [[word:danapojo|danapojo]] || [[word:danaposho|danaposho]] || [[word:danapo|danapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:danapofoth|danapofoth]] || [[word:danapofoj|danapofoj]] || [[word:danapofosh|danapofosh]] || [[word:danapof|danapof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:danapĂŻf|danapĂŻf]] || [[word:danapĂŻf|danapĂŻf]] || [[word:danapĂŻf|danapĂŻf]] || [[word:danapĂŻf|danapĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:danapĂŻfĂŻf|danapĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:danapĂŻfĂŻf|danapĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:danapĂŻfĂŻf|danapĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:danapĂŻfĂŻf|danapĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:danapĂŻf|danapĂŻf]] || [[word:danapĂŻf|danapĂŻf]] || [[word:danapĂŻf|danapĂŻf]] || [[word:danapĂŻf|danapĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:danapĂŻf|danapĂŻf]] || [[word:danapĂŻf|danapĂŻf]] || [[word:danapĂŻf|danapĂŻf]] || [[word:danapĂŻf|danapĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:danapĂŠthĂŠ|danapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:danapĂŠjĂŠ|danapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:danapĂŠshĂŠ|danapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:danapĂŠ|danapĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:danapathath|danapathath]] || [[word:danapajaj|danapajaj]] || [[word:danapashash|danapashash]] || [[word:danap|danap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:danapatha|danapatha]] || [[word:danapaja|danapaja]] || [[word:danapasha|danapasha]] || [[word:danapa|danapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:danapafath|danapafath]] || [[word:danapafaj|danapafaj]] || [[word:danapafash|danapafash]] || [[word:danapaf|danapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:danapasha|danapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godanapasha|godanapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidanapasha|gokidanapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:danapnĂŒsha|danapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godanapnknĂŒsha|godanapnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidanapnĂŒsha|gokidanapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:danapshĂ«sha|danapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godanapnkshĂ«sha|godanapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidanapshĂ«sha|gokidanapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:danaprosha|danaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godanapnkrosha|godanapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidanaprosha|gokidanaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:danapmusha|danapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godanapnkmusha|godanapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidanapmusha|gokidanapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:danapsherasha|danapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godanapnksherasha|godanapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidanapsherasha|gokidanapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:danapngasha|danapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godanapnkngasha|godanapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidanapngasha|gokidanapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:danapyasha|danapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godanapnkyasha|godanapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidanapyasha|gokidanapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:danapyamasha|danapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godanapnkyamasha|godanapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidanapyamasha|gokidanapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:danapnĂŒshĂ«sha|danapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godanapnknĂŒshĂ«sha|godanapnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidanapnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokidanapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:danapnĂŒrosha|danapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godanapnknĂŒrosha|godanapnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidanapnĂŒrosha|gokidanapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:danapnĂŒmusha|danapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godanapnknĂŒmusha|godanapnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidanapnĂŒmusha|gokidanapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:danapshĂ«nĂŒsha|danapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godanapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|godanapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidanapshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokidanapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:danapshĂ«rosha|danapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godanapnkshĂ«rosha|godanapnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidanapshĂ«rosha|gokidanapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:danapshĂ«musha|danapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godanapnkshĂ«musha|godanapnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidanapshĂ«musha|gokidanapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:danapronĂŒsha|danapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godanapnkronĂŒsha|godanapnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidanapronĂŒsha|gokidanapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:danaproshĂ«sha|danaproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godanapnkroshĂ«sha|godanapnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidanaproshĂ«sha|gokidanaproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:danapromusha|danapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godanapnkromusha|godanapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidanapromusha|gokidanapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:danapmunĂŒsha|danapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godanapnkmunĂŒsha|godanapnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidanapmunĂŒsha|gokidanapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:danapmushĂ«sha|danapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godanapnkmushĂ«sha|godanapnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidanapmushĂ«sha|gokidanapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:danapmurosha|danapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godanapnkmurosha|godanapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidanapmurosha|gokidanapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:danap|danap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dĂŠnĂŠp|dĂŠnĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodanap|hodanap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodĂŠnĂŠp|hodĂŠnĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodanap|hohodanap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodĂŠnĂŠp|hohodĂŠnĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒdanap|nĂŒdanap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒdĂŠnĂŠp|nĂŒdĂŠnĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdanap|nĂŒnĂŒdanap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdĂŠnĂŠp|nĂŒnĂŒdĂŠnĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻdanap|nĂŻdanap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻdĂŠnĂŠp|nĂŻdĂŠnĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdanap|nĂŻnĂŻdanap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdĂŠnĂŠp|nĂŻnĂŻdĂŠnĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludanap|ludanap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludĂŠnĂŠp|ludĂŠnĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludanap|luludanap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludĂŠnĂŠp|luludĂŠnĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidanap|lidanap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidĂŠnĂŠp|lidĂŠnĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidanap|lilidanap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidĂŠnĂŠp|lilidĂŠnĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodanap|kodanap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodĂŠnĂŠp|kodĂŠnĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodanap|kokodanap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodĂŠnĂŠp|kokodĂŠnĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedanap|kedanap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedĂŠnĂŠp|kedĂŠnĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedanap|kekedanap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedĂŠnĂŠp|kekedĂŠnĂŠp]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
